Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Teranon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== The Captain ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Teranon is a wise man and a longtime Archmage who was one of Benri's mentors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Teranon is a visibly aged half-Aethril with lights that sparkle like stars in his hair.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Teranon is a character who interacts with Benri and Varic.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|'''Ch 2''' — Teranon performs analysis spells.}}

== The Knight ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Teranon is a half-Aethril and an advisor to Benri Vallenar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|'''Ch 21''' — Teranon is a member of Benri's team.}}

== The Pilot ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Teranon is Benri's friend.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Teranon was one of Benri's magical mentors.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 5''' — Teranon is an expert but not a leader.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Teranon has gray hair that sparkles with the stars of a half-Aethril.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 11''' — Teranon can manifest an orange-ish magic circle over his eye to examine data.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Benri borrowed a spell from Teranon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Teranon spoke to Benri before the call ended.}}
* {{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|'''Ch 39''' — Teranon was unaware of Benri's life-saving clone measure.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
